input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with a comprehensive breakdown. Provide a ranked list of holdings including ticker, current price, quantity, market value, and weight percentage. Display daily P&L metrics including total portfolio value, daily change (absolute), and daily change percentage. Provide a sector allocation breakdown showing percentage distribution by category. Include YTD performance with time series data (daily dates and values) from the beginning of the year to today, along with the total YTD return percentage.

data.title: Equity Portfolio Overview
data.subtitle: Comprehensive breakdown of holdings, P&L metrics, sector allocation, and YTD performance

blocks.title: Portfolio P&L Summary

dataContract.description: Portfolio-level summary showing NAV, daily return, and YTD return

blocks.sub_question: What is the current Net Asset Value, daily return percentage, and YTD return percentage of the portfolio?

blocks.title: Ranked Holdings List

dataContract.description: Sortable table of portfolio holdings with ticker, price, quantity, market value, and weight

blocks.sub_question: What is the ranked list of portfolio holdings including ticker, current price, quantity, market value, and weight percentage?

blocks.title: Sector Allocation

dataContract.description: Percentage distribution of portfolio value by sector category

blocks.sub_question: What is the percentage breakdown of the portfolio by sector?

blocks.title: YTD Performance Trend

dataContract.description: Daily time series of portfolio value from the beginning of the year to today

blocks.sub_question: What is the daily time series of portfolio performance from the beginning of the year to today?

metadata.question: Show me my equity portfolio with a comprehensive breakdown. Provide a ranked list of holdings including ticker, current price, quantity, market value, and weight percentage. Display daily P&L metrics including total portfolio value, daily change (absolute), and daily change percentage. Provide a sector allocation breakdown showing percentage distribution by category. Include YTD performance with time series data (daily dates and values) from the beginning of the year to today, along with the total YTD return percentage.
